channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [MPSLTD] MPS Ltd: App-eLearn Pty Ltd (Australia) De-Registered
item.description:
MPS Ltd announces the voluntary de-registration (strike-off) of its step-down subsidiary, App-eLearn Pty Ltd (Australia), effective May 13, 2026. App-eLearn had no active business operations and was not a material subsidiary. The de-registration will not impact the company's revenue, operations, or business activities. This action complies with SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • App-eLearn Pty Ltd, a step-down subsidiary of MPS Ltd, has been voluntarily de-registered.
  • The de-registration is effective from May 13, 2026, in accordance with Australian law.
  • App-eLearn Pty Ltd had no active business operations and was not a material subsidiary.
  • The de-registration does not impact MPS Ltd's revenue, operations, or business activities.
  • The company has complied with SEBI regulations regarding the de-registration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MPS LTD. | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [CMSINFO] CMS Info Systems: FY26 Results, ₹2.50 Final Dividend, Buyback
item.description:
🔥 Trending

CMS Info Systems Ltd's board approved audited financial results for FY26, recommending a final dividend of ₹2.50 per share. This brings the total dividend for FY26 to ₹5.25 per share, including an interim dividend of ₹2.75. The board also approved a buyback of up to 49,39,126 equity shares at ₹340 per share, totaling ₹167.93 Cr. A record date of May 22, 2026, has been set for the buyback. The 19th Annual General Meeting was also approved.

  • CMS Info Systems approved audited FY26 financial results.
  • Final dividend of ₹2.50 per share recommended, totaling ₹5.25 for FY26.
  • Buyback of 49,39,126 shares at ₹340 per share approved, totaling ₹167.93 Cr.
  • Record date for buyback is set for May 22, 2026.
  • 19th Annual General Meeting of the Company approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CMS Info Systems Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [NCLIND] NCL Industries: Re-lodgement of Physical Share Transfer Requests
item.description:
NCL Industries Ltd. announced the re-lodgement of transfer requests for physical shares from February 5, 2026, to April 30, 2026, as per SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/38/13/11(2)2026-MIRSD-POD/I/3750/2026 dated January 30, 2026. The report from the Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, M/s. Venture Capital and Corporate Investments Pvt. Limited, indicates that no requests were received, processed, approved, or rejected during this period, and the average processing time was NIL days.

  • NCL Industries reports on re-lodgement of physical share transfer requests.
  • No transfer requests were received or processed during the specified period.
  • Report is in compliance with SEBI circular dated January 30, 2026.
  • Venture Capital and Corporate Investments Pvt. Ltd. is the Registrar and Share Transfer Agent.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NCL INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Business Update

item.title: [CMSINFO] CMS Info Systems: Buyback at ₹340/Share; Record Date May 22, 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

CMS Info Systems Ltd's board approved a buyback of up to 49,39,126 equity shares, representing 3% of the total paid-up equity share capital, at ₹340 per share, payable in cash. The aggregate amount for the buyback will not exceed ₹167,93,02,840. The record date for determining shareholder eligibility is set for May 22, 2026. The board also recommended a final dividend of ₹2.50 per equity share. Audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, were approved with an unmodified opinion from the statutory auditors.

  • CMS Info Systems announces buyback of shares at ₹340 per share.
  • Buyback size is up to 49,39,126 equity shares, 3% of total equity.
  • Record date for buyback eligibility is Friday, May 22, 2026.
  • Final dividend of ₹2.50 per share recommended, subject to AGM approval.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved with unmodified auditor opinion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CMS Info Systems Ltd | Category: Buyback

item.title: [UTLSOLAR] Fujiyama Power Systems FY26 Revenue Up 72.3% YoY to ₹26,545 Mn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fujiyama Power Systems Ltd announced its audited annual financial results and limited reviewed quarterly financial results for the period ended March 31, 2026. Q4 FY26 revenue from operations stood at ₹9,008 Mn, up 87.5% YoY, with an EBITDA of ₹1,715 Mn, up 116.9% YoY. PAT for Q4 FY26 was ₹1,063 Mn, up 107.5% YoY. For FY26, revenue from operations reached ₹26,545 Mn, a growth of 72.3% YoY, and EBITDA was ₹4,903 Mn, up 97.3% YoY. The company added over 80 distributors, 450 dealers, and 30 exclusive Shoppes in Q4 FY26.

  • Q4 FY26 Revenue from Operations at ₹9,008 Mn, up 87.5% YoY.
  • Q4 FY26 EBITDA at ₹1,715 Mn, up 116.9% YoY with a margin of 19.0%.
  • FY26 Revenue from Operations reached ₹26,545 Mn, up 72.3% YoY.
  • Company commissioned 2,000 MW solar panel manufacturing capacity at Ratlam.
  • Setting up a 1,200 MW TOPCon solar cell manufacturing facility at Ratlam.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fujiyama Power Systems Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [UTLSOLAR] Fujiyama Commissions 2000 MW Solar Panel Facility
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fujiyama Power Systems Ltd has commissioned its 2,000 MW solar panel manufacturing facility in Ratlam, Madhya Pradesh. This facility is part of a larger greenfield expansion project to enhance integrated solar manufacturing capabilities. The plant will initially operate at 1,000 MW capacity, with plans to reach full capacity by Q4FY27. The company's total solar panel manufacturing capacity has increased to 3,568 MW. Commissioning of inverter and battery manufacturing lines faced delays due to technology upgrades and geopolitical factors, with inverter line expected in Q1FY27 and battery line in Q2FY27.

  • Fujiyama commissions 2,000 MW solar panel manufacturing facility in Ratlam.
  • Total solar panel manufacturing capacity increases to 3,568 MW.
  • Inverter line commissioning expected in Q1FY27; battery line in Q2FY27.
  • Expansion supports backward integration and supply-chain efficiencies.
  • Plant will initially operate at 1,000 MW capacity.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fujiyama Power Systems Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [MAXINDIA] Max India Monitoring Agency Report for Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
item.description:
Max India Ltd has submitted a Monitoring Agency Report by CARE Ratings Limited for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, regarding the utilization of proceeds from its Rights Issue of ₹124.23 crore. The report, as per SEBI regulations, indicates no deviation from the stated objectives of the issue. It has been reviewed by the Audit Committee and the Board of Directors of the company.

  • CARE Ratings reports no deviation from the objectives of Max India's Rights Issue.
  • The Monitoring Agency Report covers the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
  • The Rights Issue amount monitored is ₹124.23 crore.
  • The report was reviewed by Max India's Audit Committee and Board of Directors.
  • CARE Ratings confirms no conflict of interest in monitoring the issue proceeds.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Max India Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [JAGRAN] Jagran Prakashan: Appeals Filed in NCLAT Regarding Order
item.description:
Jagran Prakashan Ltd (JPL) disclosed that Jagran Media Network Investment Private Limited (JMNIPL) has filed an appeal before the National Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT), Allahabad, seeking enforcement of a resolution dated 14th July, 2023. JPL has also filed an appeal before the NCLAT impugning the order dated 23rd April, 2026, seeking reliefs against the removal of directors. Both appeals were listed before the NCLAT, Delhi, and have been deferred to 22nd May, 2026, at JMNIPL's request.

  • JMNIPL filed an appeal (C.A. (AT) No. 187 of 2026) before NCLAT seeking enforcement of a resolution.
  • JPL filed an appeal (C.A. (AT) No. 189 of 2026) against the order dated 23rd April, 2026.
  • Both appeals are now listed on 22nd May, 2026 before NCLAT, Delhi.
  • The appeals relate to the dismissal of C.A. Nos. 4, 5 and 6 of 2026 and the vacation of the stay on the EGM.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JAGRAN PRAKASHAN LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [SARVESHWAR] Sarveshwar Foods to Raise USD 100 Million & Increase Capital
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sarveshwar Foods Ltd's board approved raising funds up to USD 100 million through various instruments, including equity shares and convertible bonds. They also approved increasing the authorized capital from ₹160 Crores to ₹310 Crores, subject to member approval. Mr. Mubarak Singh was re-appointed as an Independent Director for 5 years, and borrowing limits were enhanced from ₹200 Crores to ₹1,000 Crores. Loans, investments, guarantees or security under section 185 & 186 of Companies Act,2013 upto an aggregate of ₹250 Crores were also approved subject to shareholders approval.

  • Board approves raising up to USD 100 Million via equity, bonds, or other securities.
  • Authorised Capital increased from ₹160 Cr to ₹310 Cr, pending member approval.
  • Mubarak Singh re-appointed as Independent Director for 5 years, subject to approval.
  • Borrowing limits increased from ₹200 Cr to ₹1,000 Cr.
  • Loans, investments, guarantees or security under section 185 & 186 of Companies Act,2013 upto an aggregate of ₹250 Crores were also approved subject to shareholders approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sarveshwar Foods Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CMSINFO] CMS Info Systems Q4 Services Revenue Crosses ₹600 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

CMS Info Systems Ltd announced its Q4 FY26 results, with services revenue crossing ₹600 Cr for the first time. The company's EBITDA margin expanded by 280 bps to 25.6%. The board approved a ₹168 Cr buyback. FY27 revenue guidance of ₹2,800–2,900 Cr was reaffirmed, and a final dividend of ₹2.50 per share was approved. Q4 saw a sequential inflection with growth in services revenue, EBITDA margin, and PAT. The company made two strategic acquisitions in FY26: Securens and FSS Managed Services, totaling ₹190 Cr.

  • Q4 services revenue at ₹609 Cr, up 6% QoQ.
  • EBITDA margin expanded 280 bps to 25.6% in Q4.
  • Board approves ₹168 Cr buyback at ₹340 per share.
  • FY27 revenue guidance reaffirmed at ₹2,800–2,900 Cr.
  • Final dividend of ₹2.50 per share approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CMS Info Systems Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
